description_long: This is a two-story public building with a flat roof, primarily colored in white with red accents and turquoise trim. The front façade features large windows and a prominent awning above the entrance, with two large poster frames and a sign reading 'Cinema' above the door, though the building is annotated as an ambulance station. The structure is set on a paved lot with marked parking spaces, street lamps, and a sidewalk, and is accompanied by a bus and a car parked nearby. There is a red-and-white striped canopy on one side, possibly indicating a secondary entrance or waiting area. The building's exterior is simple and geometric, with minimal ornamentation and a utilitarian design. No explicit ambulance station signage, medical symbols, or garage doors for emergency vehicles are visible.
description: A modern, two-story public building with red and turquoise accents, large windows, and a striped side canopy, set on a paved lot with parking and street lamps.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance with a turquoise awning, poster frames, a bus on the adjacent road, and parking spaces in front.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the plain back wall, rooftop details, and a car parked in the lot.
description_view_2: Left-side view displaying the striped canopy, side entrance, and the bus on the street.
description_view_3: Direct front view with clear visibility of the main entrance, 'Cinema' sign, poster frames, and landscaping elements.
attribute_ambulance_signage: No visible signage explicitly identifies the building as an ambulance station. The only visible sign reads 'Cinema' above the main entrance, with no medical or emergency-related wording or symbols.
attribute_emergency_vehicle_parking_bays: There are no clearly designated parking bays or areas specifically marked for emergency vehicles or ambulances. The parking spaces in front of the building are standard and lack any special markings or signage.
attribute_red_cross_or_medical_symbols: No Red Cross, Star of Life, or other medical symbols are visible on the building exterior, doors, signage, or surrounding area.
attribute_garage_doors_for_rapid_vehicle: No garage doors designed for ambulance entry or exit are visible. The building lacks any large doors or bays that would facilitate rapid deployment of emergency vehicles.
attribute_architectural_style: The building exhibits a modern, utilitarian architectural style with a flat roof, geometric form, large windows, and minimal ornamentation. The façade uses simple color blocking and a prominent awning, with a striped canopy adding a touch of visual interest.
